note: value = company value (cash + fleet + cargo). The WIN goal is CASH. No run below cleared the cash goal; best company value shown for reference.

deterministic_milkrun_bot.description: Best-known hand-coded strategy: load sugar at Las Palmas, sell 8-unit lots across 6 ports in 3 regions, repeat. Adversarially designed economy (VWAP path-invariant settlement, 6-zone regional demand saturation, 1.12/0.88 spread) caps it.

llm_prompt_benchmark.setup: Full-auto 365-day season, company value. 5 prompt levels L1(none)->L5(expert milk-run instructions), 2 seeds.
llm_prompt_benchmark.finding: No monotonic effect of prompt detail; level variance < seed variance. Prompts alone do not beat the v2 economy on these models.

policy_ab_27b.setup: Standing-Policy system (orders compiled to policy, engine executes). L1 vs L5, 2 seeds.
policy_ab_27b.finding: Policy system lifts scores 2.2-4.3x vs per-port decisions, AND free-rein (L1) consistently beats milk-run instruction (L5) on both seeds - prompt is now a real lever. Still no run cleared the 10,000 cash goal.

headline: Across 24 measured LLM seasons (a3b, 27b; prompt + compiled policy) plus the best deterministic bot, no configuration cleared the 10,000-ducat cash goal. Best company value: 8,805. Best bot final cash: 9,193.
